meta.title: For Prime Contractors - PrimeReach
meta.description: Prime Contractors: Post opportunities, find qualified Small Businesses, and manage your contracting needs.

fields.title: For Prime Contractors
fields.subtitle: Find qualified Small Businesses, post structured opportunities, and streamline your contractor outreach with PrimeReach.

cards.title: Post Structured Opportunities
cards.body: Create detailed opportunity listings that attract the most qualified Small Businesses for your project requirements.

cards.title: Find Qualified Small Businesses
cards.body: Search our directory of pre-screened Small Businesses by district, certification, and work category to find the right partners.

cards.title: Manage Contracting
cards.body: Track applications, communicate with small businesses, and manage your contracting workflow all in one place.

fields.heading: Opportunity Posting Requirements
fields.body: All prime contractor opportunity postings must include a clear project description, required certifications, district location, estimated value, and submission deadline. This ensures small businesses can accurately assess fit and submit complete proposals.

fields.heading: Start Finding Qualified Small Businesses
fields.text: Register your prime contractor account today to post opportunities and connect with our Small Business network.
